brand.name: DJERBA CONSTRUCTION
brand.logo_instructions: Create a sophisticated SVG logo combining a house silhouette and a key, using Navy Blue (#1E3A5F) and Red (#C41E3A). Use purely vector/SVG paths, no placeholder images.

hierarchy.h1: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#1E3A5F]
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-[#94A3B8]

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid (Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.rtl_ltr_strategy: CRITICAL: Implement RTL support natively. Use Tailwind logical properties (e.g., ms-, me-, ps-, pe-, start, end) instead of physical properties (ml-, pr-, left, right). The dashboard layout must fully mirror when switching from French/English to Arabic.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), no heavy shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and soft ambient shadow (shadow-md) on interactive cards.
surface_strategies.header: Solid White or Navy background with a sharp 1px bottom border. DO NOT use glassmorphism for this enterprise CRM to maintain high legibility.
surface_strategies.sidebar: Deep Navy (#1E3A5F) background with white/slate-300 text. Active links highlighted with Red (#C41E3A) left border or subtle white/10 background.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#1E3A5F] text-white hover:bg-[#2A4D7C]. Destructive/Hot: bg-[#C41E3A] text-white hover:bg-[#DE2A4B]. Sharp or subtly rounded (rounded-sm).
components.tables: Clean, dense data display. Use sticky headers, very subtle striping or 1px bottom borders on rows. Align numbers to the right (end).
components.multilingual_toggle: Prominent dropdown in the header supporting FR, AR, EN. Clicking AR must immediately swap document direction to dir='rtl'.
components.whatsapp_chat: Dedicated sidebar or split-view pane. Message bubbles: Navy for outgoing, Light Gray for incoming. Include timestamp and read receipts.
components.kpi_widgets: Top row of dashboard. Each widget has a label, large numeric value, and a small trend indicator (e.g., +5% this month).

motion.hover: Subtle, fast transitions (duration-200 ease-out). Target background colors and subtle Y-axis translation.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in for dashboard widgets to prevent jarring loads.

login_background.description: Abstract navy geometric background for login screen.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. White text on Navy (#1E3A5F) passes. White on Red (#C41E3A) passes.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Buttons, dropdowns, forms, and tabs.
accessibility.rtl_testing: Verify layout mirroring in RTL (Arabic) view, ensuring arrows, icons, and text alignment adjust properly.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup required fonts: Outfit (headings) and Plus Jakarta Sans (body).
Setup Tailwind config with defined colors and logical CSS variables.
Implement Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them: borders must be sharp (rounded-sm), background solid, no default shadow.
Ensure the entire application uses Tailwind logical properties (e.g. padding-inline-start `ps-` instead of `pl-`) to support the Arabic RTL mode seamlessly.
Create the WhatsApp AI Chat interface to feel native and responsive, keeping conversation history clear.
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image services; use the provided image URLs.
Develop a functional Language Switcher that toggles the HTML `dir` attribute between 'ltr' and 'rtl' and updates UI accordingly.
Implement data-testid on every interactive element.
